name: 优化 Firefly 运行时内存占用

description: Baseline: RSS memory usage after warmup + requests

asi.hypothesis: Baseline measurement of RSS memory after typical request workload

description: Optimize estimateSize() to avoid JSON.stringify - within noise

asi.hypothesis: Avoid JSON.stringify in estimateSize() to reduce temporary memory allocation
asi.result: Within noise floor, ~0.3MB improvement but not statistically significant
asi.next_action_hint: Try a more impactful optimization like lazy loading

description: Use Float64Array for memoryHistory - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: Use Float64Array for memoryHistory to reduce per-object overhead
asi.rollback_reason: No improvement - startup time increased, RSS unchanged. TypedArray has fixed allocation cost upfront
asi.next_action_hint: Focus on request-time memory growth instead of fixed data structures

description: Add tag string interning in cache-handler - within noise

asi.hypothesis: Intern cache tag strings to reduce memory from duplicate string allocations
asi.next_action_hint: The cache is probably not populated enough in benchmarks to show effect. Try optimizing hot request paths instead
asi.result: Within noise floor, improvement not statistically significant

description: Test --max-old-space-size=64 - no effect on RSS

asi.hypothesis: Test effect of --max-old-space-size=64 on RSS
asi.rollback_reason: No effect - current usage already below 64MB limit
asi.next_action_hint: Look for unused dependencies or code that can be removed

description: Lazy memory collection startup - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: Make memory collection lazy (start on first access instead of startup)
asi.rollback_reason: No improvement - the timer overhead is negligible, and the setInterval doesn't allocate memory beyond its closure
asi.next_action_hint: Focus on reducing module loading or request-time allocations

description: Add image cache TTL config - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: Add image cache TTL and disable source maps
asi.next_action_hint: These config changes don't affect benchmark paths (no image requests). Consider measuring with image-heavy workloads

description: Increased request count test - reverted to keep baseline consistent

asi.hypothesis: Increase request count to 60 (10 warmup + 50 measurement) to amplify memory differences
asi.next_action_hint: Memory growth is linear with requests - about 0.1MB per cycle. Need to investigate per-request allocations
asi.result: 8MB growth with 240 requests vs 7MB with 100 requests, confirming linear growth

description: Unified cache storage (merge cache + metadata Maps)

asi.hypothesis: Merge cache and metadata into single unified Map to reduce Map overhead
asi.result: Within noise floor. Reduced code complexity by using single storage structure
asi.note: Cache handler bundle size reduced from 3.45KB to 3.40KB

description: Disable image optimization in production - no improvement

asi.hypothesis: Disable Next.js image optimization in production to reduce memory
asi.rollback_reason: No improvement - image optimization code is lazy loaded and not triggered in benchmark

description: Final measurement - stable at ~46.5MB with all optimizations

asi.hypothesis: Final measurement after all optimizations
asi.summary: Total improvement ~0.35MB (0.75%) from 46.58MB to ~46.23MB. All optimizations are code quality improvements even if memory savings are within noise floor.

name: 优化 UT 执行时间（保持覆盖率 95%+）

description: Baseline: 1261 tests, 6.10s, 99%+ coverage

asi.hypothesis: Baseline measurement

description: Replace DNS timeout test with fast mock - 6.10s → 1.13s

asi.hypothesis: Replace 5s DNS timeout test with fast mock rejection

description: Confirm: 1261 tests, 1.09s, stable performance

asi.hypothesis: Confirm stable performance after optimization

description: Fix gist URL bug - exclude GitHub special paths from README fetch

asi.hypothesis: Fix bug where gist URLs triggered real fetch requests causing 5s timeout
asi.change: Added GITHUB_SPECIAL_PATHS set to exclude gist/settings/etc from README image fetch
asi.test_improvement: 5.44s → 1.84s (test no longer waits for network timeout)

description: Confirm stable test performance at ~1.1s

asi.hypothesis: Confirmation run after gist URL fix

name: 持续优化 Firefly 运行时内存消耗

description: Baseline: RSS memory after warmup + 20 request cycles

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline memory measurement for new optimization session

description: Baseline re-measurement for noise estimation

asi.hypothesis: Re-measure baseline to estimate noise floor

description: --max-semi-space-size=2 to reduce young generation footprint

asi.hypothesis: Reduce V8 semi-space size from default 16MB to 2MB to lower RSS for new-space allocations
asi.result: No improvement; new-space already small under this workload
asi.next_action_hint: Try a more aggressive combo: --max-old-space-size=128 with --optimize-for-size

description: --optimize-for-size — server did not start

asi.hypothesis: Use --optimize-for-size to reduce RSS at slight perf cost
asi.next_action_hint: NODE_OPTIONS may have leaked into bun/npx; need to apply only to next start subprocess

description: Add in-process TTL cache to feed.xml and sitemap.xml — regressed

asi.hypothesis: Add 60s in-process cache for sitemap.xml + feed.xml to avoid re-rendering markdown for 50 posts every request
asi.next_action_hint: Try caching only feed.xml without sitemap to isolate; or measure with memory_growth metric instead
asi.result: RSS 46.17 -> 70.48; startup also 540ms -> 3401ms. Likely Next.js statically prerendered sitemap with 50000 posts at build time

description: Fresh-build baseline (was stale)

asi.hypothesis: Re-measure baseline after fresh build to get accurate value
asi.note: Previous baseline 46.17 used stale .next artifacts from days ago; fresh rebuild reveals 76.8MB true baseline

name: 优化 Firefly 运行时内存（fresh build baseline）

description: Baseline (fresh build): RSS after warmup + 20 request cycles

asi.hypothesis: Establish fresh-build baseline. Variation across runs ~2-3MB.
asi.observations: Baseline 41.27, post-warmup 79.47, growth 38.20MB indicates significant per-request allocation

name: 优化 L1+L2+L3 测试执行效率

description: Baseline: L1=1.03s, L2+L3=107.9s (build 2x + tests sequential)

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline for L1+L2+L3 total wall time
asi.observation: test:e2e calls startNextServer twice and rebuilds twice. L2 fileParallelism=false makes 24 files sequential.
potential_wins: Build once and share .next between two server starts

description: Build Next.js once for both API+browser servers

asi.hypothesis: Build Next.js once and share between API+browser server starts

description: Vitest projects: parallel L2 + serial racy files

asi.hypothesis: Split L2 into parallel + serial projects: parallel for stateless tests, serial for site_settings/backup mutators
asi.next: Also evaluate L3 (already 8 workers) and reduce per-L2 test latency / build time

description: Run L2 and L3 in parallel \u2014 caused L3 flake (shared DB)

asi.hypothesis: Run L2 and L3 in parallel against separate Next.js servers
asi.rollback_reason: L2 deletes posts that L3 admin tests are reading via /admin/posts list — data races on shared DB caused 1 L3 failure
asi.next_action_hint: Either use separate DBs or only parallelize within each level

description: describe.concurrent for mcp.test.ts + maxWorkers=8

asi.hypothesis: describe.concurrent in mcp.test.ts (longest pole) + maxWorkers=8
asi.next: L3 is 33s, hard to shrink without dropping tests. Build is 13s. Try to reduce build (e.g., turbopack).

description: Use turbopack for E2E build (5s faster than webpack)

asi.hypothesis: Use turbopack for E2E build (--turbo flag) instead of webpack
asi.next: L3 and L2 are now closer; investigate L3 worker count or per-spec concurrency
asi.result: Build 13.3s→8.3s. Total 72.4→66.9s. Production build script unchanged.

description: Playwright: workers=10, fullyParallel

asi.hypothesis: Increase Playwright workers from 8 to 10 (16 cores), enable fullyParallel
asi.result: L3 33.4s→30.6s. Total 66.9→63.5s. 12 workers caused flakes (image load), 10 stable.
